processing.text: declare @q nvarchar(4000), @duplicate nvarchar(512), @locked nvarchar(512), @field varchar(32), @wsID varchar(8), @voucherID varchar(8) declare @master varchar(16), @detail varchar(16), @inquiry varchar(16), @general varchar(16), @baseCurrency varchar(8), @id char(13), @datetime0 char(21), @d0 datetime declare @user int, @admin bit, @r int, @i int, @m int, @y int, @max1 int, @max2 int, @currentID int, @count int, @roundPrice int, @roundAmount int select @d0 = getdate() select @datetime0 = convert(char(8), @d0, 112) + ' ' + convert(char(12), @d0, 114) select @i = 1, @admin = @@admin, @user = @@userID, @master = 'm&Detail;$', @detail = 'd&Detail;$', @inquiry = 'i&Detail;$', @general = 'c&Detail;$000000', @voucherID = '&Code;' select @locked = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Đã khóa số liệu, kiểm tra lại ngày chứng từ tại dòng %s.' else N'Data is locked, please check the date of voucher at row %s.' end select @duplicate = case when @@language = 'v' then N'&s1; đã tồn tại.' else '&s2; already exists.' end select @wsID = rtrim(val) from options where rtrim(name) = 'm_ws_id' select @baseCurrency = rtrim(val) from options where rtrim(name) = 'm_ma_nt0' select @roundPrice = cast(rtrim(val) as int) from options where rtrim(name) = 'm_round_gia' select @roundAmount = cast(rtrim(val) as int) from options where rtrim(name) = 'm_round_tien' select @max1 = character_maximum_length from information_schema.columns where table_name = @master + '000000' and column_name = 'so_ct' select @max2 = character_maximum_length from information_schema.columns where table_name = @detail + '000000' and column_name = 'so_lsx' -- Checking update @@table set so_ct = space(@max1 - len(rtrim(so_ct))) + ltrim(so_ct) --select @r = min(stt) from @@table a join c&Detail;$000000 b on a.ngay_ct = b.ngay_ct and a.so_ct = b.so_ct --if @r is not null begin -- select replace(replace(replace(@duplicate, '%s1', so_ct), '%s2', convert(varchar(12), cast(ngay_ct as smalldatetime), 103)), '%s3', @@delta + @r) as message from @@table where --stt = @r -- return --end -- Update update @@table set so_lsx = space(@max2 - len(rtrim(so_lsx))) + rtrim(so_lsx), dvt = case when a.dvt <> '' then a.dvt else b.dvt end, ma_nt = case when a.ma_nt <> '' then a.ma_nt else @baseCurrency end, tk_vt = case when a.tk_vt <> '' then a.tk_vt else b.tk_vt end from @@table a left join dmvt b on a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt -- Check Site select @field = 'ma_kho', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_kho not in (select ma_kho from dmkho)&Error; select @field = 'ma_khon', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_khon not in (select ma_kho from dmkho)&Error; select @field = 'ma_kho', @r = min(stt) from @@table a join dmkho b on a.ma_kho = b.ma_kho or a.ma_khon = b.ma_kho group by a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct having count(distinct b.ma_dvcs) > 1&Error; create table #unit(ma_dvcs char(32), ngay_ct smalldatetime, so_ct char(12), ma_kho char(16), ma_khon char(16)) insert into #unit select b.ma_dvcs, a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, a.ma_kho, a.ma_khon from @@table a join dmkho b on a.ma_kho = b.ma_kho group by b.ma_dvcs, a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, a.ma_kho, a.ma_khon -- Locked Date select @r = min(stt) from @@table a, dmstt b where (a.ngay_ct < b.ngay_gh1) or (a.ngay_ct > b.ngay_gh2) or (a.ngay_ct <= b.ngay_ks)&LockedDate; select @r = min(stt) from @@table a, dmctks b where b.user_id = @user and b.ma_ct = @voucherID and a.ngay_ct <= b.ngay_ks&LockedDate; select @r = min(stt) from @@table a, dmdvcsks b, #unit c where a.ngay_ct = c.ngay_ct and b.ma_dvcs = c.ma_dvcs and a.ngay_ct <= b.ngay_ks&LockedDate; select @r = min(stt) from @@table a, dmct2ks b where b.ma_ct = @voucherID and a.ngay_ct <= b.ngay_ks&LockedDate; select @r = min(stt) from @@table a, sysdaterules b where b.user_id = @user and ((b.ngay_ct1 is not null and a.ngay_ct < b.ngay_ct1) or (b.ngay_ct2 is not null and a.ngay_ct > b.ngay_ct2))&LockedDate; if @admin <> 1 begin select @field = 'ma_kho', @r = min(stt) from @@table a where not exists(select 1 from dmkho c where a.ma_kho = c.ma_kho and c.ma_dvcs in (select distinct ma_dvcs from sysunitrights where user_id = @user and r_new = 1))&Error; end select @field = 'ma_kho', @r = min(stt) from @@table a where exists(select 1 from #unit b where a.ngay_ct = b.ngay_ct and a.so_ct = b.so_ct and a.ma_kho=b.ma_kho and a.ma_khon = b.ma_khon having count(b.ma_dvcs) > 1)&Error; if exists(select 1 from options where name = 'm_gia_nh_kho' and val = '1') begin select @field = 'ma_kho', @r = min(stt) from @@table a join dmkho b on a.ma_kho = b.ma_kho or a.ma_khon = b.ma_kho join dmvt c on a.ma_vt = c.ma_vt where c.gia_ton = 1 or c.gia_ton = 4 group by a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct having count(distinct ma_nh) > 1&Error; end select @field = 'ma_gd', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_gd not in (select ma_gd from dmmagd where ma_ct = @voucherID)&Error; select @field = 'so_buoc', @r = min(stt) from @@table where so_buoc not in (1, 2)&Error; select @field = 'ma_vt', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_vt not in (select ma_vt from dmvt)&Error; select @field = 'dvt', @r = min(stt) from @@table a left join vdmvtqddvt b on a.dvt = b.dvt and (a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt or b.ma_vt = '*') left join dmvt c on a.ma_vt = c.ma_vt and a.dvt = c.dvt where b.dvt is null and c.dvt is null&Error; select @field = 'ma_lo' select @r = min(stt) from @@table a where a.ma_lo = '' and exists(select 1 from dmvt b where a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt and b.lo_yn = 1)&Error; select @r = min(stt) from @@table a where a.ma_lo <> '' and not exists(select 1 from dmvt b where a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt and b.lo_yn = 1)&Error; select @r = min(stt) from @@table a where ma_lo <> '' and not exists(select 1 from dmlo b where a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt and a.ma_lo = b.ma_lo)&Error; select @field = 'so_luong', @r = min(stt) from @@table a where exists(select 1 from dmvt b where a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt and b.gia_ton = 3 and a.so_luong = 0)&Error; select @field = 'ma_nt', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_nt not in (select ma_nt from dmnt)&Error; select @field = 'tk_vt', @r = min(stt) from @@table where tk_vt not in (select tk from dmtk where loai_tk = 1)&Error; select @field = 'tk_du', @r = min(stt) from @@table where tk_du not in (select tk from dmtk where loai_tk = 1)&Error; select @field = 'ma_vv', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_vv <> '' and ma_vv not in (select ma_vv from dmvv)&Error; select @field = 'ma_bp', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_bp <> '' and ma_bp not in (select ma_bp from dmbp)&Error; select @field = 'so_lsx', @r = min(stt) from @@table where so_lsx <> '' and so_lsx not in (select so_lsx from phlsx)&Error; select @field = 'ma_sp', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_sp <> '' and ma_sp not in (select ma_vt from vdmsp)&Error; select @field = 'ma_hd', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_hd <> '' and ma_hd not in (select ma_hd from dmhd)&Error; select @field = 'ma_phi', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_phi <> '' and ma_phi not in (select ma_phi from dmphi)&Error; select @field = 'ma_nk', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_nk <> '' and ma_nk not in (select ma_nk from v20dmnk)&Error; -- Gather create table #id(stt_rec char(13), ngay_ct smalldatetime, so_ct char(12), ma_kho char(16), ma_khon char(16), stt int, id int identity(1, 1)) insert into #id(ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_kho, ma_khon, stt) select ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_kho, ma_khon, min(stt) from @@table group by ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_kho, ma_khon select @count = count(*) from #id select @currentID = stt_rec from dmstt update dmstt set stt_rec = stt_rec + @count update #id set stt_rec = @wsID + replace(str(id + rtrim(@currentID) , 9), ' ', '0') + @voucherID select top 0 a.stt_rec, a.stt_rec0, a.line_nbr, a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, a.ma_vt, a.ma_vi_tri, a.ma_vi_trin, a.ma_lo, a.dvt, b.nhieu_dvt, a.he_so, a.so_luong, a.gia_nt, a.gia, a.tien_nt, a.tien, a.px_gia_dd, a.tk_vt, a.tk_du, a.ma_nx, a.ma_vv, a.ma_bp, a.so_lsx, a.ma_sp, a.ma_hd, a.ma_phi into #d&Detail; from d&Detail;$000000 a, dmvt b, dmkho c insert into #d&Detail; select b.stt_rec, replace(str((a.stt - b.stt) + 1, 3), ' ', '0'), (a.stt - b.stt) + 1, a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, a.ma_vt, '''', '''', a.ma_lo, a.dvt, c.nhieu_dvt, 1, a.so_luong, a.gia_nt, round(a.gia_nt * a.ty_gia, @roundPrice), a.tien_nt, round(a.tien_nt * a.ty_gia, @roundAmount), a.px_gia_dd, a.tk_vt, a.tk_du, a.tk_du, a.ma_vv, a.ma_bp, a.so_lsx, a.ma_sp, a.ma_hd, a.ma_phi from @@table a join #id b on a.ngay_ct = b.ngay_ct and a.so_ct = b.so_ct and a.ma_kho = b.ma_kho and a.ma_khon = b.ma_khon left join dmvt c on a.ma_vt = c.ma_vt order by a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, a.stt update #d&Detail; set he_so = b.he_so from #d&Detail; a join vdmvtqddvt b on (a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt or b.ma_vt = '*') and a.dvt = b.dvt where a.nhieu_dvt = 1 select top 0 stt_rec, status, ma_dvcs, ma_nk, ngay_ct, so_ct, loai_ct, ma_kho, ma_khon, ma_gd, ong_ba, dien_giai, so_buoc, ma_nt, ty_gia, t_so_luong, t_tien_nt, t_tien into #m&Detail; from m&Detail;$000000 insert into #m&Detail; select b.stt_rec, @status, c.ma_dvcs, a.ma_nk, a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, isnull(e.loai_ct, '3'), a.ma_kho, a.ma_khon, a.ma_gd, a.ong_ba, a.dien_giai, a.so_buoc, a.ma_nt, a.ty_gia, d.t_so_luong, d.t_tien_nt, d.t_tien from @@table a join #id b on a.stt = b.stt join #unit c on a.ngay_ct = c.ngay_ct and a.so_ct = c.so_ct and a.ma_kho = c.ma_kho and a.ma_khon = c.ma_khon join (select stt_rec, sum(so_luong) as t_so_luong, sum(tien_nt) as t_tien_nt, sum(tien) as t_tien from #d&Detail; group by stt_rec) d on b.stt_rec = d.stt_rec join (select ma_gd, min(loai_ct) as loai_ct from dmmagd where ma_ct = @voucherID group by ma_gd) e on a.ma_gd = e.ma_gd create table #i&Detail;(stt_rec char(13), ngay_ct smalldatetime, so_ct char(12), ma_dvcs char(16), status char(1), user_id0 int, c$ varchar(8000), m$ varchar(8000), d$ varchar(8000), id int identity(1, 1)) insert into #i&Detail; select stt_rec, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_dvcs, @status, @user, convert(varchar(12), ngay_ct, 112) + so_ct + stt_rec, '#10$' + rtrim(ma_kho) + '#20$' + rtrim(ma_khon) + '#30$' + rtrim(ma_gd) + '#40$' + rtrim(ma_nt), '' from #m&Detail; declare @v10 varchar(8000), @v20 varchar(8000), @v30 varchar(8000) while @count >= @i begin select @id = stt_rec from #i&Detail; where id = @i select @v10 = '', @v20 = '', @v30 = '' select @v10 = @v10 + '#10$' + rtrim(a.ma_vt) from (select distinct ma_vt from #d&Detail; where stt_rec = @id) a select @v20 = @v20 + '#20$' + rtrim(a.tk_vt) from (select distinct tk_vt from #d&Detail; where stt_rec = @id) a select @v30 = @v30 + '#30$' + rtrim(a.ma_nx) from (select distinct ma_nx from #d&Detail; where stt_rec = @id) a update #i&Detail; set d$ = isnull(@v10, '') + isnull(@v20, '') + isnull(@v30, '') where stt_rec = @id select @i = @i + 1 end -- Insert declare @p varchar(32), @masterFields varchar(8000), @detailFields varchar(8000), @masterTable varchar(32), @detailTable varchar(32), @inquiryTable varchar(32) select @masterFields = 'stt_rec, ma_dvcs, ma_ct, ma_nk, loai_ct, so_lo, ngay_lo, ma_gd, ngay_lct, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_nt, ty_gia, ma_kho, ma_khon, so_buoc, ngay_den, so_pn, ngay_pn, ong_ba, ma_kh, dien_giai,' select @masterFields = @masterFields + ' t_so_luong, t_tien_nt, t_tien, nam, ky, status, datetime0, datetime2, user_id0, user_id2, contract_id, bcontract_id, fee_id, so_dh, job_id, prd_id, dept_id, mo_nbr,' select @masterFields = @masterFields + 'fcode1, fcode2, fcode3, fdate1, fdate2, fdate3, fqty1, fqty2, fqty3, fnote1, fnote2, fnote3, s1, s2, s3, s4, s5, s6, s7, s8, s9' select @detailFields = 'stt_rec, stt_rec0, ma_ct, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_vt, ma_sp, ma_bp, so_lsx,' select @detailFields = @detailFields + 'dvt, he_so, ma_kho, ma_khon, ma_vi_trin, ma_vi_tri, ma_lo, ma_vv, ma_nx, tk_du, tk_vt,' select @detailFields = @detailFields + 'so_luong, gia_nt, gia, tien_nt, tien, px_gia_dd,' select @detailFields = @detailFields + 'stt_rec_pn, stt_rec0pn, stt_rec_yc, stt_rec0yc, line_nbr, ma_hd, ma_phi, so_dh_i,' select @detailFields = @detailFields + 'ma_td1, ma_td2, ma_td3, sl_td1, sl_td2, sl_td3, ngay_td1, ngay_td2, ngay_td3, gc_td1, gc_td2, gc_td3, s1, s2, s3, s4, s5, s6, s7, s8, s9' select distinct month(ngay_ct) as m, year(ngay_ct) as y into #k from #id select @r = min(y * 12 + m) from #k while @r is not null begin select @m = m, @y = y from #k where y * 12 + m = @r select @p = rtrim(@y) + replace(str(@m, 2), ' ', '0') select @masterTable = @master + @p, @detailTable = @detail + @p, @inquiryTable = @inquiry + @p select @q = 'insert into ' + @masterTable + '(' + @masterFields + ')' + ' select stt_rec, ma_dvcs, ''' + @voucherID + ''',ma_nk, loai_ct, '''', null, ma_gd, ngay_ct, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_nt, ty_gia, ' select @q = @q + 'ma_kho, ma_khon, so_buoc, null, '''', null, ong_ba, '''', dien_giai, t_so_luong, t_tien_nt, t_tien, ' select @q = @q + '0, 0, ''' + @status + ''', getdate(), getdate(), ' + rtrim(@user) + ',' + rtrim(@user) + ', ' select @q = @q + ''''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', null, null, null, 0, 0, 0, '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', 0, 0, 0, null, null, null' select @q = @q + ' from #m&Detail; where month(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@m) + ' and year(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@y) exec sp_executesql @q select @q = 'insert into ' + @detailTable + '(' + @detailFields + ')' + ' select stt_rec, stt_rec0, ''' + @voucherID + ''', ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_vt, ma_sp, ma_bp, so_lsx, dvt, he_so, '''', '''', ma_vi_trin, ma_vi_tri, ma_lo, ma_vv, ma_nx, tk_du, tk_vt, ' select @q = @q + 'so_luong, gia_nt, gia, tien_nt, tien, px_gia_dd,' select @q = @q + ''''', '''', '''', '''', line_nbr, ma_hd, ma_phi, '''', '''', '''', '''', 0, 0, 0, null, null, null, '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', 0, 0, 0, null, null, null' select @q = @q + ' from #d&Detail; where month(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@m) + ' and year(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@y) exec sp_executesql @q select @q = 'insert into ' + @inquiryTable + ' select stt_rec, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_dvcs, status, user_id0, c$, m$, d$' select @q = @q + ' from #i&Detail; where month(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@m) + ' and year(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@y) exec sp_executesql @q select @q = 'insert into ' + @general + ' select stt_rec, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_dvcs, status, user_id0' select @q = @q + ' from #i&Detail; where month(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@m) + ' and year(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@y) exec sp_executesql @q select @r = min(y * 12 + m) from #k where y * 12 + m > @r end if @status = '3' begin declare @Statement nvarchar(4000) select @Statement = 'update #in set ngay_lct = ngay_ct, datetime0 = ''' + @datetime0 + ''', datetime2 = ''' + @datetime0 + ''', user_id0 = ' + rtrim(@user) + ', user_id2 = ' + rtrim(@user) + ' from #in ' select @statement = @statement + char(13) + 'select * into #r from #in' select @statement = @statement + char(13) + 'update #r set stt_rec_dc = stt_rec' select @statement = @statement + char(13) + 'update #r set nxt = 1, ma_kho = a.ma_khon, ma_vi_tri = a.ma_vi_trin, ma_khon = a.ma_kho,' select @statement = @statement + char(13) + 'loai_ct = ''2'', ma_gd = ''2'', sl_nhap = a.sl_xuat, sl_nhap1 = a.sl_xuat1, sl_xuat = 0, sl_xuat1 = 0, tien_nhap = a.tien_xuat, tien_xuat = 0, tien_nt_n = a.tien_nt_x, tien_nt_x = 0, tk_du = a.tk_vt, tk_vt = a.tk_du,' select @statement = @statement + char(13) + 'pn_gia_tb = case when (c.gia_ton = 1 or c.gia_ton = 4) and a.px_gia_dd = 0 then 1 else 0 end, ma_ct = ''PNF'', stt_rec = left(a.stt_rec, 10) + ''PNF''' select @statement = @statement + char(13) + 'from #r join #in a on #r.stt_rec = a.stt_rec and #r.stt_rec0 = a.stt_rec0 join dmvt c on #r.ma_vt = c.ma_vt' select @statement = @statement + char(13) + 'insert into #in select * from #r' exec MaxvOnline$Voucher$Import$PostInventory '#m&Detail;', '#d&Detail;', @voucherID, '#k', 'gia_nt0, tien_nt0, gia0, tien0, gia01, gia_nt01, pn_gia_tb, cp_nt, cp, thue_suat_nk, nk_nt, nk, thue_suat_ttdb, ttdb_nt, ttdb, gia_nt21, gia21, gia_nt2, gia2, tien_nt2, tien2, cp_thue_yn, thue_suat, thue_nt, thue, ck_nt, ck, nam, ky, cp_vc, cp_bh, cp_khac, sl_td1, sl_td2, sl_td3, s4, s5, s6', 'so_seri, tk_gv, tk_dt, tk_thue_nk, tk_thue_ttdb, ma_tt, tk_thue_no, tk_thue_co, tk_ck, so_dh2, so_dh3, ma_nvbh, ma_nv, stt_rec_pn, stt_rec0pn, stt_rec_px, stt_rec0px, stt_rec_dc, stt_rec_yc, stt_rec0yc, so_ct0, so_seri0, ma_td1, ma_td2, ma_td3, gc_td1, s1, s2, so_lo', 'ct_dc = 1, gia_nt1 = b.gia_nt, gia1 = b.gia, tien_nhap = 0, tien_nt_n = 0, tien_xuat = b.tien, tien_nt_x = b.tien_nt, ma_nk = c.ma_nk', @Statement, 0, 2 end if @status = '3' begin declare @glGroup varchar(128), @glAcctField varchar(128), @glAcctFieldRef varchar(128), @glAmountField varchar(128), @glFCAmountField varchar(128), @glKey varchar(512), @glNoAccList varchar(128), @glNoAccListRef varchar(128) declare @Numeric nvarchar(4000), @String nvarchar(4000), @External nvarchar(4000), @cNoAccounts varchar(128) select @cNoAccounts = replace(rtrim(val), '''', '') from options where name = 'm_tk_tk_vt' select @glAcctField = 'tk_du', @glAcctFieldRef = 'tk_vt', @glAmountField = 'tien', @glFCAmountField = 'tien_nt', @glKey = '1 = 1', @glNoAccList = '0', @glNoAccListRef = '0' select @Numeric = 'nam, ky, sl_td1, sl_td2, sl_td3, s4, s5, s6', @String = 'so_lo, ong_ba, ma_gd, so_dh, gc_td1', @External = 'dien_giai_h = b.dien_giai, datetime0 = ''' + @datetime0 + ''', datetime2 = ''' + @datetime0 + ''', user_id0 = ' + rtrim(@user) + ', user_id2 = ' + rtrim(@user), @Statement = 'update #gl set ct_nxt = 2, status = 1, ma_gd = b.ma_gd from #gl a join #m&Detail; b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec' select @glGroup = groupby from @@sysDatabaseName..voucherinfo where ma_ct = @voucherID select a.*, b.ma_dvcs, '' as ma_kh, '' as ma_kh_ref, @voucherID as ma_ct, b.loai_ct, b.ngay_ct as ngay_lct, b.ma_nt, b.ty_gia, b.dien_giai as dien_giai, b.dien_giai as dien_giai_h, null as ma_ku, null as ma_td1, null as ma_td2, null as ma_td3, b.ma_nk into #dGL from #d&Detail; a join #m&Detail; b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec where (a.tk_vt <> a.tk_du) and (not (@cNoAccounts <> '' and dbo.ff_inlist(tk_du, @cNoAccounts) = 1)) exec MaxvOnline$Voucher$Import$PostGL2 '#m&Detail;', '#dGL', @voucherID, @glAcctField, @glAcctFieldRef, @glAmountField, @glFCAmountField, @glKey, @glNoAccList, @glNoAccListRef, @glGroup, @Numeric, @String, @External, @Statement, '#k' end
